title: Novel antiestrogenic heterocyclic compounds
abstract: The present invention provides novel heterocyclic compounds of Formula I wherein A, B, E, ring Z, Y, L, ring X, D, m, n, R 7 and R 8 are as defined in the specification as estrogen receptor antagonists/degraders. The compound of Formula I can be used for the treatment of cancers mediated by estrogen receptors. (Formula I ).
